mapper.sql: id, name, project, task_type, planar_structure_file, three_d_structure_file, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM qc_wire_harness_type ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO qc_wire_harness_type (id, name, project, task_type, planar_structure_file, three_d_structure_file, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{name}, #{project}, #{taskType}, #{planarStructureFile}, #{threeDStructureFile}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
